data_in.description: mzML mass spectrometry data file (raw or test input)

data_out.description: mzPeak binary output file with valid format structure and metadata

domain_knowledge: mzPeak is a new binary format for mass spectrometry data designed for scalability and interoperability, with a draft specification available as a living document.

The Rust implementation at the repository root is the primary production-ready tool; it includes both a library and command-line converter tools, whereas Python and R implementations support reading only.
The mzpeak_prototyping repository is a work-in-progress with no stability guarantee; successful conversion requires the tool to produce binary output conforming to the draft mzPeak specification.
mzML is a standardized XML-based format for mass spectrometry data; the converter must parse mzML input and serialize its content into mzPeak's binary structure.

direct_checks: verify file exists at github:mobiusklein__mzpeak_prototyping repository root
verify Rust build succeeds: `cargo build --release` or equivalent command runs without error
verify command-line converter tool executable is produced after build
verify converter accepts at least one supported input format (e.g., mzML file) as a command-line argument
verify converter produces an output file with .mzpeak or expected mzPeak file extension
file_format_is: output file conforms to mzPeak specification structure (multiple language implementations can read it, or byte structure matches specification)
output_matches_reference: converted file can be read back by the Rust library without error
expert_review: expert review: assess whether the output mzPeak file preserves semantic integrity and mass spectrometry metadata fidelity from the input format (e.g., m/z values, intensities, scan structure are accurately represented)
expert review: confirm that at least one supported input format is documented or determinable from the repository structure (e.g., mzML, mzXML, or other proteomics format)

task_description: Build and execute the Rust command-line converter tool to convert an mzML input file into a valid mzPeak output file. Produce a single converted mzPeak file in the correct binary format.
task_objective: Build and execute the Rust CLI converter to transform a supported input format (e.g., mzML) into a valid mzPeak output file.
title: Reconstruct the mzPeak CLI Converter tool for transforming existing mass-spectrometry formats into mzPeak

workflow_description: 1. Clone or obtain the mzpeak_prototyping Rust repository from github.com/mobiusklein/mzpeak_prototyping at the repository root. 2. Build the command-line converter tool using Rust's cargo build system. 3. Execute the converter tool with an mzML input file as the source format, specifying the desired mzPeak output file path. 4. Verify that the output file is produced in valid mzPeak binary format with correct structure and metadata.
